summary: Tested Huurovereenkomsten (Lease Agreements) feature in Admin Dashboard. All backend API tests (12/12) and frontend UI tests passed. Features verified: lease CRUD operations, lease document generation, Dashboard tab redesign, Huurders tab with leases table, and Stroombrekers realistic circuit breaker panel.

backend_api.GET_leases: PASS - Returns list with correct structure
backend_api.POST_leases: PASS - Creates lease with tenant_name, apartment_number, dates, monthly_rent
backend_api.DELETE_leases: PASS - Removes lease and returns confirmation
backend_api.GET_lease_document: PASS - Returns HTML document with HUUROVEREENKOMST title

frontend_ui.dashboard_tab_overzicht: PASS - Shows stats in table format
frontend_ui.huurders_tab_table: PASS - Shows 4 tenants in table layout
frontend_ui.huurovereenkomsten_table: PASS - Shows leases below Huurders table
frontend_ui.lease_modal_form: PASS - All fields present with correct data-testid
frontend_ui.lease_modal_submit: PASS - Creates lease and closes modal
frontend_ui.lease_edit_button: PASS - Opens modal with 'Huurovereenkomst Bewerken' title
frontend_ui.lease_delete_button: PASS - Shows confirmation and removes lease
frontend_ui.stroombrekers_panel: PASS - Realistic circuit breaker design with ON/OFF toggles

features_tested: Navigate to Admin Dashboard via Beheerder button
Dashboard tab: Overzicht stats table + Recente betalingen table
Huurders tab: Huurders table (4 tenants) + Huurovereenkomsten table
Lease CRUD: Create, Read, Update, Delete via API and UI
Lease form: tenant select, apartment select, dates, monthly rent, voorwaarden
Lease document: HTML generation with token authentication
Stroombrekers tab: Realistic circuit breaker panel with 4 toggles
critical_code_review_comments: LeaseModal component (lines 1234-1344) correctly implements form with all required data-testid attributes
TenantsTab (lines 398-628) properly displays both Huurders and Huurovereenkomsten tables
Backend lease endpoints (lines 819-962 in kiosk.py) implement full CRUD with proper validation
Lease document endpoint correctly uses token query param for new tab authentication
PowerTab (lines 1052-1186) implements realistic circuit breaker design with screws, LED indicators, and toggle switches
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test lease during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Huurovereenkomsten feature fully tested. 1 lease exists for Jan de Test (A101, 2026-01-01 to 2027-01-01, SRD 1,000.00). 4 test tenants exist. Tuya circuit breaker API is MOCKED in backend. All data-testid attributes verified: add-lease-button, lease-tenant-select, lease-apartment-select, lease-start-date, lease-end-date, lease-monthly-rent, lease-voorwaarden, lease-submit, lease-row-{id}, lease-doc-{id}, lease-edit-{id}, lease-delete-{id}.

mocked_apis.note: Tuya circuit breaker API in kiosk.py is MOCKED
